suite.name: Demo

kw.name: Test Ollama Connection
kw.msg: [Healing] Testing Ollama connection → http://localhost:11434/api/generate [Healing] Status: 200, Response: {"model":"mistral:latest","created_at":"2026-04-21T15:29:34.171332Z","response":" I'm not sure what you mean by \"ping.\" In the context of computing, a \"ping\" is used to test network connectivity b

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_1

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg:
[Healing] Input Text → //input[@id="usernme"] [Healing] ⚠️ Failed: Element with locator '//input[@id="usernme"]' not found. [Healing] 🖼️ Screenshot captured → /Users/febinthomas/Desktop/selfHealingAll/NewAIBased/healing_screens/20260421_205942_012823__locator_not_found_input___input_id_usernme_.png
[Healing] Asking Ollama to heal locator: //input[@id="usernme"] [Healing] → Posting to http://localhost:11434/api/generate [Healing] Ollama status: 200 [Healing] ✅ Suggestion: {'type': 'name', 'locator': 'username'} [Healing] 🛠️ Auto-rewrite: replaced '//input[@id="usernme"]' with 'name=username' in 1 file(s), 1 occurrence(s). [Healing] Retrying with healed locator: name=username

Original locator not found in DOM → auto-healed. Rewrote occurrences: '//input[@id="usernme"]' → 'name=username' (1 file(s), 1 occurrence(s)). Failing the test intentionally so the incorrect coded locator is fixed and committed.
kw.status: Original locator not found in DOM → auto-healed. Rewrote occurrences: '//input[@id="usernme"]' → 'name=username' (1 file(s), 1 occurrence(s)). Failing the test intentionally so the incorrect coded locator is fixed and committed.

test.status: Original locator not found in DOM → auto-healed. Rewrote occurrences: '//input[@id="usernme"]' → 'name=username' (1 file(s), 1 occurrence(s)). Failing the test intentionally so the incorrect coded locator is fixed and committed.

test.name: TC_2

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg:
[Healing] Input Text → //input[@id="passord"] [Healing] ⚠️ Failed: Element with locator '//input[@id="passord"]' not found. [Healing] 🖼️ Screenshot captured → /Users/febinthomas/Desktop/selfHealingAll/NewAIBased/healing_screens/20260421_205947_744872__locator_not_found_input___input_id_passord_.png
[Healing] Asking Ollama to heal locator: //input[@id="passord"] [Healing] → Posting to http://localhost:11434/api/generate [Healing] Ollama status: 200 [Healing] ✅ Suggestion: {'type': 'name', 'locator': 'password'} [Healing] 🛠️ Auto-rewrite: replaced '//input[@id="passord"]' with 'name=password' in 1 file(s), 1 occurrence(s). [Healing] Retrying with healed locator: name=password

Original locator not found in DOM → auto-healed. Rewrote occurrences: '//input[@id="passord"]' → 'name=password' (1 file(s), 1 occurrence(s)). Failing the test intentionally so the incorrect coded locator is fixed and committed.

suite.doc: Collection of common keywords to use across tests/suites
